name: 產品發布會/品牌活動
description: 商業場合中的身份揭露讓反轉效果最大化——在全行業面前打臉反派，讓社會地位的翻轉具有公共見證性。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: I want to formally introduce you all to my granddaughter-in-law and the future lady of the Hua family. She is Goian. / She's the ays of Shiang Nai International.
examples.context: 商業場合中的身份揭露讓反轉效果最大化——在全行業面前打臉反派，讓社會地位的翻轉具有公共見證性。
